entries.name: Besauce

entries.description: A gift from blooming flowers, given in return for offering ten colors of the world to the Vein. An Aniimo egg born from a blossom. Prismana colors ripple across its shell, and a sweet floral scent rises when you bring it close. "What kind of Aniimo will hatch from it?"

entries.name: Charstone
entries.description: Charred rock formed by the flames of certain Aniimo. Charstone fragments can also be obtained while mining Ferric Charstone

entries.name: Common Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing Common Power. Despite its common look, the shard contains a mysterious power that can balance other powers. There is nothing special on its surface yet touching it makes you feel comfortable and complete

entries.name: Coral Branch
entries.description: Fresh branches naturally shed from coral clusters. Their vivid offshoots contain the natural pigments favored by Popapus. Reefish are captivated by the satisfying crunch when biting into them and often use the branches to file down their teeth

entries.name: Dark Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing the power of Dark Element. The black mysterious shard seems to have the ability of swallowing light

entries.name: Dawndelion Aromathyst
entries.description: Commonly used as a perfume-making plant in Bloomville. They symbolize friendship and companionship. The pink and yellow flowers always grow together, allowing their nectar to have two different tastes

entries.name: Dream Iris Aromathyst
entries.description: Commonly used as a perfume-making plant in Bloomville. They symbolize passion and first love. It's believed that wooing with Dream Irises guarantees unwavering love, making them the most popular flowers among youngsters

entries.name: Duskwhisper Aromathyst
entries.description: Common perfume-making herb from Bloomville. They symbolize waiting and longing. People returning home after a long trip will know that Bloomville is just ahead when they appear on the horizon

entries.name: Earth Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing the power of Earth Element. It came from the soil beneath an ancient forest untouched by sunlight, full of the essence of the earth, symbolizing the endless cycle of life and growth

entries.name: Emberbud Aromathyst
entries.description: Aromathyst brewed from Emberbuds by Dewies. The burning traces exude the sweet aroma of caramel while the fine golden sand flows across the facets within like an everlasting sunset

entries.name: Ether Heart
entries.description: A crystal formed from pure elemental energy. Rarely found near Veins, Always guarded by aniimo who are drawn to its power

entries.name: Ferric Charstone
entries.description: High-quality iron with a metallic sheen. Helmut and Jawling can absorb the iron element within to strengthen themselves

entries.name: Fire Shard
entries.description: A peculiar shard containing the power of Fire Element. It feels warm to hold in the hand. Idyllians often use them to start fires

entries.name: Flux Crystal
entries.description: Full of mythic elements which can be converted into any other elements

entries.name: Unbroken Flameruff Spirit
entries.description: To grow stronger, to rise above all—this is the Emberpups' birthright. The fiercest Flameruffs battle in the Thousand-Ridge Fang, seeking to transcend their limits and claim the title of Scorchhowl. But victory is rare. Defeated, their bodies become Ridgeback Trees, while their spirits linger, tormented by the strength they could never grasp

entries.name: (Old) Clovis’s Diary
entries.description: Old Clovis’s diary, detailing his studies of the Life Force Seeds and his regrets toward young Clovis

entries.name: [Limited Merch] Commemorative Badge
entries.description: During the Third Closed Beta, Pathfinders who accumulate 7 Reunion Points will receive 100 Glimmers and be entered into a prize drawing. We’ll randomly select 300 lucky Pathfinders to receive a commemorative badge. Winners will be announced on the official website within 10 days after the test ends

entries.name: [Limited Merch] Commemorative Badge
entries.description: During the Third Closed Beta, Pathfinders who obtain this item through the Journey of Trials event will receive 200 Glimmers and be entered into a prize drawing. We’ll randomly select 300 lucky Pathfinders to receive a commemorative badge. The winners will be announced on the official website within 10 business days after the test ends

entries.name: [Limited Merch] Commemorative Folder
entries.description: During the Third Closed Beta, Pathfinders who obtain this item through the Journey of Trials event will receive 100 Glimmers and be entered into a prize drawing. We’ll randomly select 500 lucky Pathfinders to receive a commemorative folder. The winners will be announced on the official website within 10 business days after the test ends

entries.name: [Limited Merch] Commemorative T-shirt
entries.description: During the Third Closed Beta, Pathfinders who accumulate 9 Reunion Points will receive 200 Glimmers and be entered into a prize drawing. We’ll randomly select 100 lucky Pathfinders to receive a commemorative T-shirt personalized with their in-game name . Winners will be announced on the official website within 10 days after the test ends

entries.name: A Hair Band
entries.description: The hair band old Clovis gave to Alpha Irisal. A symbol of their friendship that started when they were young and lasted their whole lives

entries.name: Aimo Core
entries.description: A self-aware AI born from the holographic system

entries.name: Ancestor Cube
entries.description: A ceremonial object discovered in an underground temple, protected by a powerful Aniimo. Mysterious divine patterns cover its surface, with faint images and text visible within its core, their meaning still undeciphered. Principal Oswen notes that it has appeared several times throughout Idyll mythology, each appearance signaling imminent transformation. Like a mysterious cosmic die that determines the land’s destiny and initiates new chapters in history. The nature of changes it brings this time awaits discovery by Pathfinders

entries.name: Ancient Recipe
entries.description: A very ancient recipe, written in the ancient Idyllian language, now mostly faded. Luckily BINI can translate it: Offer the fragrance of life and growth, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of regeneration. Offer the fragrance of tolerance and change, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of protection. Offer the fragrance of courage and passion, and the Aeons shall grant the blessing of hope

entries.name: Aromapudding
entries.description: A velvety pudding infused with Fragrancia. Each spoonful brings silky sweetness and aromatic bliss that lingers long after

entries.name: Binding Oath
entries.description: “From the moment we twined, we became each other’s greatest friend.” This is an eternal and binding oath

entries.name: Bittersweet Dew
entries.description: Dew gathered from bittersweet blooms. Imbued with both sorrow and happiness, it exudes a complex, layered fragrance. The perfumer Fantine is searching for it in Driftwise Meadow

entries.name: Bloomville Invitation Gift
entries.description: A specially treated flower used for decoration and perfume. It never withers and always gives off a wonderful fragrance. During the Bloom Festival, Bloomville gives it to invited guests as a keepsake

entries.name: Bloomville Token
entries.description: Fragrant token. Use them to exchange for Bloomville specialties

entries.name: Blue Furball's Afternoon
entries.description: Those who appreciate it may find it precious

entries.name: Blue Lake Down
entries.description: While submerged feathers rest on the lakebed, their fragrance preserves the memory of flights that once reached the sky

obtain_methods.label: Mobility
obtain_methods.detail: Explore Idyll

entries.name: Bouldus's Roar
entries.description: Those who appreciate it may find it precious

entries.name: Broken Helmet
entries.description: When will the storm cease? The broken bronze already rests there

entries.name: Bulbly Electrolinguistics
entries.description: Researcher Sayn noticed that the electric currents of Bulblies contain a unique language which is hard to understand even after twining. He observed them and recorded till a Luminelle stunned him. Then he woke up to find that the note was gone

entries.name: Burst of Red
entries.description: Packed with the fiery energy of flame flower roots, this item is highly unstable and prone to explosion. Handle with care

entries.name: Celestis Family Research I
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Celestis family

entries.name: Celestis Family Research II
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Celestis family

entries.name: Celestis Family Research III
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Celestis family

entries.name: Chance Encounter Gift: Energy Resonance
entries.description: During the investigation, the Leader Aniimo seems to have briefly resonated with lingering energy from Legendary Aniimo in the area, awakening more of its capabilities

entries.name: Collectible Card
entries.description: Add our WeCom contact for a chance to win Aniimo merch!

entries.name: Crumpled Report Card
entries.description: A crumpled, wrinkled report card

entries.name: Data Chip
entries.description: Some say existence consists of memories. Could these data fragments represent a form of memory?

entries.name: Dewfall Iris
entries.description: A rare spice plant prized for its rich, lasting fragrance

entries.name: Dragonsbreath Mocha
entries.description: A beverage from ChillBeanz in Astra, Glacy's special Icy Mint Burst features a refreshing mint aroma that explodes with a rush of icy coolness in your mouth, invigorating and refreshing your mind

entries.name: Dragonsbreath Mocha
entries.description: A beverage from ChillBeanz in Astra, Glacy's special Icy Mint Burst features a refreshing mint aroma that explodes with a rush of icy coolness in your mouth, invigorating and refreshing your mind

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at ChillBeanz
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Dusky Fragrance
entries.description: Every scent capable of bewildering butterflies begins its journey within humble essences and unrefined aromathysts

obtain_methods.label: Mobility
obtain_methods.detail: Explore Idyll

entries.name: Echoback Salt
entries.description: A precious material found on Echoback bones, full of a distinct fragrance unique to the ocean. One of the important ingredients for crafting the legendary incense offered to Aeon

entries.name: Echoes of a Vigil
entries.description: Through endless cycles of the moon, beyond the death of distant stars... Still the Echoback's spirit stays untouched by solitude. For beyond canvas's edge, age-old songs still resound. That gleaming hope within the notes, an echo of endless vigil

entries.name: Embroidered Patch
entries.description: Add our WeCom contact for a chance to win Aniimo merch!

entries.name: Eternal Red
entries.description: Opposites create eternity in their clash

entries.name: Flame Flower
entries.description: A flower formed by the convergence of fire elements atop the summit of the Russet Highlands. It gives off a spicy aroma. Cress, the perfumer from Bloomville, is looking for it to craft a legendary perfume

entries.name: Flame Flower Root
entries.description: A flower root formed by the convergence of fire elements atop the summit of the Russet Highlands. It emits a dangerous aura. Grace, the perfumer from Bloomville, is looking for it to craft a legendary perfume

entries.name: Flameheart Stone
entries.description: A precious material found in Russet Highlands, full of a distinct fragrance unique to fire. One of the important ingredients for crafting the legendary incense offered to Aeon

entries.name: Flareburst Flower
entries.description: An orange flower growing on ridgeback trees. It flickers like ever-burning flames. Perfumer Ranka from Bloomville is looking for it to craft a legendary perfume

entries.name: Flintgrass Kebab
entries.description: The dishes from Wolfie's by Astra are culinary delights crafted with precise fire control, boasting an incredibly rich aroma. What could be more satisfying than taking big bites of meat?

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at Wolfie's
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Floropedia of Bloomville
entries.description: This book details the flower species of Bloomville and its surroundings. While Bloomville is renowned for its exceptional lavender and iris, it's less known that other flower varieties also thrive here

entries.name: Fragrancia
entries.description: Valuable natural spice plant with strongly scented spring flowers. The primary ingredient in "Slumberscent" production

entries.name: Freedom’s Breeze
entries.description: As long as we reach the same destination

entries.name: Golden Answer
entries.description: A branch that fell from the Blitz Tree during a thunderstorm, like an answer from the clouds. Perfumer Avetine from Bloomville is looking for it

entries.name: Golden Wish
entries.description: A legendary perfume crafted by perfumer Baboni with Golden Answers. This is not the scent of open devotion, but of bitterness left to steep. Pathfinder, may your wish be heard too

entries.name: Green Starine
entries.description: Unripe Starine discarded in the river. According to legend, only Rare Aniimo can determine Starine ripeness. While inedible, it can be Dismantled for a small amount of Credits

entries.name: Growth Agaric
entries.description: Mystical mushroom that enlarges the Aniimo that eats it. Effect lasts for 300s

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at FunTown
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Guide to Grandparenting
entries.description: Numerous dog-eared pages and annotations... the handwriting resembles the Elder’s

entries.name: Guiding Incense
entries.description: The guiding incense crafted by Sunia with the pollen of Irises and Irisals beloved by Flutternyms. It can help people pass through the barrier in Lumenfly Valley

entries.name: Heart's Resonance
entries.description: The resonance of the heart, guiding you to where you truly belong

entries.name: Heartfire Orange
entries.description: The true meaning of being a warrior is to never stop fighting. Never drop your fists—keep swinging for the next win, no matter how many times you lose, until that victory comes

entries.name: Holo-Bouncy Pad
entries.description: Generates a Holo-Bouncy Pad that lasts for 30s

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at FunTown
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Home
entries.description: Sacrifice and protection is about leaving and returning to home

entries.name: Iced Blastcap
entries.description: The signature specialty launched by ChillBeanz in Astra is inspired by Glacy's extreme chill, which brings out the natural sweetness of the coffee, highlighting its flavor and rich aroma

entries.name: Iced Blastcap
entries.description: The signature specialty launched by ChillBeanz in Astra is inspired by Glacy's extreme chill, which brings out the natural sweetness of the coffee, highlighting its flavor and rich aroma

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at ChillBeanz
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Iris Pollen
entries.description: Pollen of an Iris, given by a friendly Iris in the Sea of Flowers. With a soft and pure scent, it's a necessary ingredient for crafting Guiding Incense

entries.name: Iris Sachet
entries.description: A personal sachet of Dewfall Iris that soothes and calms with its gentle fragrance

entries.name: Irisal Pollen
entries.description: Pollen of an Irisal, given by an Irisal in the Sea of Flowers after some persuasion. With a bright and magnificent scent, it's a necessary ingredient for crafting the guiding incense

entries.name: Joyous Tuftball
entries.description: If a Fentuft gives you a joyous tuftball, that means it wants you to be happy!

entries.name: Lewis’s Answer 1
entries.description: An unintelligible gift from an eccentric teacher

entries.name: Lewis’s Answer 2
entries.description: An unintelligible gift from an eccentric teacher

entries.name: Lewis’s Answer 3 - Key
entries.description: A key that might be able to unlock a chest

entries.name: Lewis’s Final Answer
entries.description: Lewis’s Final Answer

entries.name: Life Force Seed
entries.description: A six-hued seed, infused with the legendary Irisal’s life essence. They placed the seed upon their dying friend, hoping to prolong his fleeting breath, but they could not rekindle what was lost. Some say it’s these very failures that paint existence in richer shades

entries.name: Lycus’s Diary
entries.description: This treasured diary was Lycus's emotional compass, documenting not just his spiritual journey across the grasslands, but also his connections with family and friends. Between its pages lies a profound truth about their world

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 1
entries.description: To the Thornblade guards, Princess Melloblum is the fairest blossom of their lineage, a treasure demanding meticulous protection. While all revere her, the First Lethal Thorn recognizes that this attention suffocates her. Yet these Thornblades, who wear their duty as honor, never pause to consider Melloblum's own desires

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 2
entries.description: Two little Budsquires, raised in the Maze of Thorns, knew the dangers of the outside world. Yet still, they longed to see it. Even if the thorns cut them, even if the pain made them weep, they kept reaching higher, desperate for a glimpse of the world beyond

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 3
entries.description: "Banished" from the princess's tea party, the observant Budsquires noticed Princess Melloblum's subdued spirits. The First Lethal Thorn's intervention, meant as protection, had only deepened her quiet distress. Where the Budsquires could release their pain in tears, the princess swallowed her tears, aware that her moods affected the entire court. The radiant figure who brought smiles to others wore none of her own

entries.name: Maze of Thorns Tale 4
entries.description: The previous Princess Melloblum had exhausted herself for her people's happiness—a sacrifice that haunted the former First Lethal Thorn with guilt. So it trained its apprentice to become the perfect guardian: one who could detect and eliminate any danger to the princess without hesitation. But years later, it realized its mistake. "Thorns hardened by tears grow unyielding, yet lose their scent." A First Lethal Thorn that knew nothing of joy could only bring sorrow to those it sought to protect

entries.name: Melancholic Fluff
entries.description: If even sadness must be hidden... isn’t that... something rather sad in itself?

entries.name: Midnight Concert Invitation
entries.description: A beautiful dark-purple invitation stamped with the Polaris Institute logo watermark

entries.name: Mint
entries.description: When refined, it can be used to create "Slumberscent." This premium ingredient emits an invigorating fragrance

entries.name: Morphling - Mask Fragment
entries.description: Morphling's memories are carried within its mask, and fragments of that mask are scattered across the world

obtain_methods.label: Morphling
obtain_methods.detail: Explore Idyll and complete Morphling gameplay

entries.name: Mouse Pad
entries.description: Add our WeCom contact for a chance to win Aniimo merch!

entries.name: Nectarflake Tart
entries.description: One bite of this heavenly sweet pastry is all it takes to win any food lover's heart!

entries.name: Nimbi Cushion
entries.description: Add our WeCom contact for a chance to win Aniimo merch!

entries.name: Pale Thorn
entries.description: The Thunderstorm Thornblade has hard thorns and a ruthless heart. She shows no mercy to her challengers in defeating them and breaking off their thorns. Perhaps she was born this way, or maybe her nature changed after she lost her brother. Once an innocent flower, it was on that rainy night she blossomed the flower of mourning in her deepest sorrow, and since then, ruthless thorns began to grow on her. Given the choice, she would have preferred to stay with her brother, remaining as a couple of ordinary Budsquires they once were, or to have started sharpening her thorn as early as possible, so she could have defended her loved ones

entries.name: Peace of Mind
entries.description: "I'll be thinking of them, but knowing that everybody is alright is good enough for me."

entries.name: Peppy's Collar
entries.description: A collar lost five years ago by a helpful Pranky, engraved with "Peppy."

entries.name: Perfect Mistake
entries.description: The most interesting thing about the world is that it creates perfect mistakes

entries.name: Perfuming Arts 101
entries.description: Behind the attention-grabbing title are time-tested perfume formulas. Required reading for aspiring perfumers. The book's impressive thickness makes the fifteen-day claim seem ambitious

entries.name: Perk Me Up Cup
entries.description: A beverage from ChillBeanz in Astra, where the dense, sweet aroma of ice cream intertwines with the rich bitterness of coffee, creating a strong and captivating contrast of flavors

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at ChillBeanz
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Photo of Home
entries.description: A hometown photo taken for a homesick Cozite in the Institute Hall

entries.name: Pink Voxel
entries.description: A mystical cube. There seems to be life inside. The affectionate air nearby has turned it pink

entries.name: Pointillist Hatching Tune
entries.description: Those who appreciate it may find it precious

entries.name: Polaris Institute Bill
entries.description: An old, yellowed philosophy book

entries.name: Polaris Trial Trophy
entries.description: During the 2026 Third Closed Beta, you cleared every challenge at Polaris Institute and completed an incredible journey of trials!

entries.name: Princess Melloblum and the Seven Budsquires
entries.description: It is both a novel and a diary. It records the Lore of how the writer Armand Twined to become the seventh Budsquire under Princess Melloblum

entries.name: Principal's Journal
entries.description: An old, yellowed novel

entries.name: Proof of Lethal Thorn
entries.description: What is the hardest thorn? Is it the will to protect hidden within its point? Or the relentless struggle to carve a path through cruel adversity?

entries.name: Red Orb
entries.description: [Placeholder]

entries.name: Research on Bittersweet Blooms
entries.description: A research note lost by aniimo researcher Sayn, recording the changes of Bittersweet Blooms

entries.name: Rosy Silhouette
entries.description: Thanks to March's kisses upon the petals, we can revisit spring whenever we wish through fragrance

obtain_methods.label: Mobility
obtain_methods.detail: Explore Idyll

entries.name: Rusty Iron Sword
entries.description: A warrior is a coward who swings at dragons

entries.name: Sayn's Message
entries.description: A message from Sayn, Aniimo Researcher at the Polaris Institute, to Clovis, the young flower farmer

entries.name: Scorch-glazed Pork Ribs
entries.description: Wolfie's signature dish in Astra features ribs tenderized by Scorchhowl with eighty-one powerful strikes, then slow-roasted with fiery fists until juicy and aromatic

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at Wolfie's
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Secret Incense
entries.description: Infused with the scents of forest, sea, and flame, this legendary incense was boldly crafted by a young perfumer. Said to be a recreation of the incense offered to the Aeon of Zephyr Coast, with an even more mysterious and luxurious scent

entries.name: Shell Sword
entries.description: A weapon left behind by Sherro. When Shelly evolves into Sherro, the shell it once lived in becomes an unbreakable knight's sword. This shell sword is covered in scars, likely marks from the battles it fought alongside its Sherro. Now, its worth lies mostly in the memories it carries

entries.name: Shepherd's Whistle
entries.description: [Placeholder]

entries.name: Shrinkstool
entries.description: Mystical mushroom that shrinks the Aniimo that eats it. Effect lasts for 300s

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at FunTown
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Sizzling Pan Special
entries.description: The dishes from Wolfie's by Astra feature springy meat pieces rolling on the iron plate, with fierce flames dancing passionately around them. The rich aroma of fat fills the air, leaving a lingering taste on the lips and teeth

obtain_methods.label: Purchase at Wolfie's
obtain_methods.detail: Available from a shop

entries.name: Slumberscent
entries.description: One soft inhale of this potent yet refreshing scent instantly melts away your stress and anxiety, wrapping you in the promise of peaceful dreams

entries.name: Soda Pop Badge
entries.description: Apparently once belonging to a Dr. Lewis fan club member before being carried to the top of the outpost station by Sayn’s Celestis

entries.name: Sparkling Shell
entries.description: A beautiful shell that sparkles with starlight. It once protected a Shelly, but that Shelly no longer needs it

entries.name: Star Grass
entries.description: The rhizome is used in "Slumberscent" production, offering excellent quality with a delicate, enchanting fragrance

entries.name: Starry Night Budclaw
entries.description: Those who appreciate it may find it precious

entries.name: Stoneflower Dew
entries.description: Dew of the stoneflower, rare flowers that bloom within ancient stone. Perfumer Marlowe from Bloomville seems to be looking for it

entries.name: Sunny Daisy without Petals
entries.description: Yellow flowers that gleam brilliantly when touched by light. Many petals have fallen off, and golden fur strands cling to the leaves, likely from a playful aniimo rolling happily through the grass. Strangely, no golden aniimo appear to be in the vicinity

entries.name: Super Truffle
entries.description: A precious material found in the Mistwoods, full of a distinct fragrance unique to life itself. One of the important ingredients for crafting the legendary incense offered to Aeon

entries.name: Susuta Shovel
entries.description: Susuta's shell shovel. With a wooden handle and a shell-made scoop, it is proof that Aniimo in this world can make tools of their own. Susuta use it to dig up beautiful shells and stones, then offer them to potential mates. With someone cute watching, a Susuta could probably dig straight through Idyll with this shovel

entries.name: Sword of Bravery
entries.description: A valuable item, consolidating Helmut's understanding of evolution

entries.name: Symphony of Reunion
entries.description: The gulf between life and death stretches beyond the vast distance starlight travels to reach us. Yet within this Echoback's song rings a symphony of joyous reunion. Their convergence in paint was fated, for no tide could ever wash away their eternal bond. All rivers return to the sea as the memories flows through each current

entries.name: Test Invitation Letter
entries.description: Invitation letter for the second open beta test. Its receiver will be automatically qualified for the test

entries.name: Torn Piece of Paper
entries.description: A torn piece of paper

entries.name: Treasure Map 1
entries.description: It vaguely shows the location of a treasure

entries.name: Treasured Large Starine
entries.description: A special large Starine from a large Starine tree. Love and longing, rich and enduring. Perfumer Dael, who lingers in the Forest of Falling Stars, may transform it into something remarkable

entries.name: Treasures of the Sea and Where to Find Them
entries.description: A maritime journal authored by seafaring Pathfinder Hayes, documenting his oceanic knowledge and recounting his experiences with the “magical lighthouse.”

entries.name: Tucking Beard
entries.description: After a certain day, Tucker somehow started to feel restless, as if it had lost something very important. So it dug itself deep into the soil in an attempt to secure peace and comfort. Yet its agitation only grew, and it started to “lose hair.” So it hid the fallen roots from its kin

entries.name: Untrimmed Flowers
entries.description: A rare spice plant known for its rich, lasting fragrance. Still needs proper trimming and sorting before it can be made into a bouquet

entries.name: Veil Heart
entries.description: A valuable item, consolidating the Veilfloat’s understanding of evolution

entries.name: Verdant Whisper
entries.description: In dreamscapes of interwoven paths, butterflies are irresistibly drawn to gardens by these enchanting scents

obtain_methods.label: Mobility
obtain_methods.detail: Explore Idyll

entries.name: Vine Core
entries.description: Each of Tucking's main vines holds a vine core, where its most important memories are kept. These cores also help sustain the vines themselves. Then one day, something mysterious arrived, severing Tucker's bond with three of its main vines—and taking with it precious memories of Perfumer Ron

entries.name: Voxel Cube

entries.name: Whalesong Blossom

entries.name: Whisper of Longing

entries.name: "Freedom" Score
entries.description: Half of the music score was created by Bloomville perfumer Lyris and the legendary band, the Windgliders. It sings of the sea and freedom. After Lyris left, the band lacked the inspiration to finish it, so they left Argent Strait and flew across the sea to find a way to complete the score

entries.name: A Letter
entries.description: Perfumer Zephyro and his partner Flutternym wished to fly across the sea. But without the wind, the Flutternym couldn't make it. So they waited for the great wind when the Bell of Freedom bloomed. Later, the wind came and they rode on it

entries.name: Anonymous Research Notes
entries.description: A research note scattered along the outer fringes of Thousand-Fang Ridge. Someone at the Outpost might know something about it

entries.name: Archival Chip - Bolty Call Logs
entries.description: The Bolties of Blitzwood believe electricity can connect all things—even hearts. That is why they love communicating via these electric “calls”, even when standing face to face. You just so happened to overhear them, and clever BINI recorded the whole conversation

entries.name: Archival Chip - Helgon Cave Mural
entries.description: A Helgon, a Rookey, and an Infergon are chatting in a circle, while Helmuts and Jawlings are sleeping on the ground. One of the Jawlings even has its teeth on a Helmut’s helmet... Someone recorded all this in an ancient language. Maybe a long time ago, Helmuts and Jawlings were friends

entries.name: Archival Chip - Mural of Infergon's Birth
entries.description: Long ago, the mountains of Russet Highlands heaved and burned, and the earth shook so violently that the Aniimo living there suffered total devastation. Then one Helmwhelp climbed to the summit. Through searing pain, it swallowed a Flame Flower blooming alone in the raging fire. The mountains finally fell silent. But the Helmwhelp's shell had been scorched blood-red, and from that day on, it could breathe roaring flame. Thus, the legendary Infergon was born

entries.name: Archival Chip - Sayn’s Manuscript
entries.description: Sayn’s masterpiece. He is so proud of this manuscript, and claims it perfectly captures the Inferlupa’s true form

entries.name: Archival Chip - Tracks of Berylline Causeway
entries.description: The right track began with a mistake. The perfect legend began with an accident

entries.name: Archival Chip - Tucker's Promise
entries.description: Young Selens wore a Glimmer Fruit Garland, convinced he had passed for his ancestor, and called out to Tucker to use the "Beautiful Singing Perfume" with him. But Tucker knew instantly that this boy was not the partner from long ago. Instead, it read the message left behind a century earlier: Sorry, my friend. I can't keep our promise

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research I
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research II
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Bonesky Family Research III
entries.description: A research note lost by Aniimo researcher Sayn, recording traits of the Bonesky family

entries.name: Canid Battle Bone
entries.description: A bone infused with the Glynsera Recas’s fighting spirit. A chill radiates from it, along with an unmistakable warrior’s will

entries.name: Fists
entries.description: The flame from Icho's fist carries its past—and everything it has come to understand about what battle truly means

entries.name: New “Freedom” Score
entries.description: One half of the music score was created by Bloomville perfumer Lyris and the legendary band, the Windgliders. It sings of the sea and freedom. After Lyris left, the band lacked the inspiration to finish it, so they left Argent Strait and flew across the sea to find a way to complete the score. The other half was finished by you and the makeshift Windgliders, and it carries the free spirit of every glider

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter's Notes
entries.description: The corrosion suggests this notebook has survived for a very long time. The handwriting changes from young and uncertain, to steady and practiced, then faint with age. It traces the life of its writer, but the stories it carries belong to more than him alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes II
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes III
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Old Truffle Hunter’s Notes IV
entries.description: What was once a complete notebook has now become scattered pages. The varying degree of damage and different handwriting among the pages suggest that they were written at different times across a long period. Perhaps the writer was not very diligent, leaving behind only a handful of entries over the years. Yet these fragments are traces of his time—weathered but vivid. And more than that... this is hardly just his story alone

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 1)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 2)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Perfumer's Memoirs (Part 3)
entries.description: It was once a complete notebook. Now, only scattered pages remain. Nearly a century later, you pick them up and read them one by one, and it feels as though the old days are unfolding right before your eyes

entries.name: Spirit Dust: Ghost Glynsera

entries.name: Tenacious Fang
entries.description: Formed from the Alpha Scorchhowl’s unyielding will. It embodies his understanding of what it means to be a warrior

entries.name: Trader’s Memoirs
entries.description: Everyone carries many faraway places in their heart. A mountain still waiting to be crossed. A sea at the end of the road. A brighter sun. A time they have never known. If you keep running, you can reach those distant places—even places beyond distance itself. But not everyone can return to that one place. The place where everything began. The place that still smells like home. The place where old friends wait, and where the past never fades

entries.name: Lumin Amber - Whisperwake Isles
entries.description: These highly pure energy ambers originated from the overflowing Vein energy and have been refined over the ages. The power they contain is so intense that it can illuminate the surroundings, which earned it the name Lumin
